calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2021 Off Calendar

Hearing Re: Plainttiff'S Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. ERIN PALACIOS, Esq. and MEREDITH DESAITELS, Esq. of Youth Law Center (Tel: 415-543-3799) for plaintiff California Alliance for Youth and Community Justice;
Atty. JAY C. RUSSELL, Esq. of the California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 415-510-3617) for defendant California State Controller Betty T. Yee.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff's Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order is DENIED.

The Court to set forth its complete ruling in a formal order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
